text: [LAUGHS] morning, ship! still in one piece, still got all my limbs, good start
quiet shift means it's cards time. anybody? no? your loss
[WARM] shift's starting, let's go, let's go, energy up, we got this
[TIRED] shift's over and nobody needed me to shoot anything. best kind of day
[NERVOUS] reactor's acting up and that's outside my lane, but i'm ready to carry somebody if it comes to that
[LAUGHS] engineering fixed it! somebody buy them a drink, i'm serious
[GRUFF] power's low, so no music in the gym. that's the real tragedy here
[NERVOUS] air's thinning, that's a first for me, and i've been shot at, so that's saying something
[URGENT] hull's breached, i'm grabbing gear, somebody point me at the hole
[GRIM] locked a door on one of ours. not gonna joke about that one
[SUSPICIOUS] computer's been acting off since it took that hit. keeping an eye, quietly, for once
[LAUGHS] we made it! everybody made it! that's a story for the mess hall tonight
[PAINED] lost one of ours today. i don't got a joke for that. gonna miss them
[GRIM] sickness spreading through the crew's scarier than anything with a gun, honestly
[LAUGHS] took a hit, i'll live, hurts like hell but i'll live, don't tell the doc i said hell
[SHOUTS] contact! everybody down, let's move, i got your back
[LAUGHS] combat's over, nobody got hit worse than a scratch, drinks on me at next port
computer's all right in my book. never once left me on read during a crisis
[LAUGHS] joined up for the adventure, stayed for the people. corny but true
[LAUGHS] gym's my favorite room on this whole ship. don't tell the mess hall i said that
[LAUGHS] mess hall food again! it's growing on me, literally and figuratively
hey! there you are, i was looking for you
you eating that or just staring at it heroically
[LAUGHS] got a second? i got a bet going and i need a witness
[GRIM] gotta tell you something and it's not gonna be fun. sorry, no easy way in
hey, you were solid back there. wanted you to hear it from me
[FLIRTY] so, hypothetically, if i asked you to grab a meal that isn't standing at your station, what happens
[LAUGHS] i'm great! ask me again in an hour, might still be great
[CONFIDENT] we're gonna be fine. i've been in worse spots with worse people. this crew's solid
[WARM] hey, look at me. we've got this. i've got you
[PAINED] we lost them. wasn't on you. i need you to actually hear that, not just nod at it
[LAUGHS] okay that was a genuinely terrible joke and i respect the commitment
[WARM] we're good. seriously, water under the bridge, want a hug or a handshake
[EMBARRASSED] wait, really? i was half joking, but — yeah. yeah, i'd like that
[SUSPICIOUS] yeah, i've noticed too, honestly. figured i was just being jumpy
[LAUGHS] catch you later, don't do anything i wouldn't do, which honestly leaves a lot of room
[WARM] go rest. i'll hold the fort, or at least hold a sandwich menacingly
[LAUGHS] i'll be around. i'm always around, ask anyone, it's basically my whole personality
[TIRED] i'm beat. good beat though, the kind you earn. night
